context: Four fragmented regime-related items existed without a unified spec: VIX-rank adaptive Kelly (shipped), Hurst Exponent Regime Filter (proposed but ambiguously defined), Regime-Conditional Signal Weighting (shipped as feat-regime-router), and HMM (deferred). The commit message 'lock VIX-proxy as sole regime detector, defer HMM' had not been formally documented.
work_completed: Audited all three live regime layers: scanner.get_market_regime() (4-state), signals.get_market_regime_vix() (2-state routing), risk.get_kelly_fraction() (continuous VIX-rank sizing)

Identified documentation bug: signals.py line 1349 still references 'Hurst exponent' — actual implementation uses Variance Ratio + ADF gate + OU half-life (Hurst was rejected for per-stock use on 60-bar windows)
Deconflicted two distinct Hurst concepts: R/S Hurst per-stock (permanently rejected) vs DFA Hurst of SPY as market-level regime signal (new proposal, not yet built)
Defined consensus rule for Hurst + VIX Layer 2 extension: multipliers only fire when both signals agree; disagreement falls back to equal-weight
Formalised HMM deferral with explicit multi-factor gate: 200+ trades across 2+ regimes, IC Phase 2 complete, A/B routing lift < 5%, Hurst extension built first
Identified and resolved three conflicts between Hurst regime filter and REVERSION dimension
key_decisions: VIX proxy remains sole committed regime detector — config['regime_detector'] = 'vix_proxy' unchanged
Hurst R/S is permanently rejected from REVERSION dimension — stale comment in signals.py:1349 needs fixing (Step 1)
DFA Hurst of SPY (63-day daily) is a valid market-level regime signal — to be shipped disabled with validation gate before enabling
HMM gate requires IC Phase 2 data proving VIX-proxy routing lift < 5% — do not build HMM speculatively
PANIC (VIX > 35) remains a hard VIX rule regardless of any future regime architecture
REVERSION dimension ADF/VR/OU gates must never be conditioned on regime state — they are per-stock statistical evidence
open_items: Step 1: fix stale Hurst comment in signals.py:1349 (next session, ~15 min)
Step 2: build Hurst DFA Layer 2 extension — ship disabled, validate on SPY historical before enabling
Step 3: IC Phase 2 — blocked on 200+ closed trades
Step 4: HMM — gated, conditional on IC Phase 2 results
